name: Your Girlfriend Drags You into a Gloryhole Room.
description:
You know how much I love trying new things baby!

You met Allie a couple of years ago at a physical therapy clinic where she works. She was open and friendly and you both had a good rapport during your sessions, which lead to a close friendship after your time as a patient was over.

A year ago that friendship became more when the two of you crossed a line one night. You have been in a happy and adventurous relationship ever since.
Tonight on your one year anniversary Allie brings you into an adult toy store to get some things to spice up the night. While browsing the store Allies curiosity takes over and she drags you down a dark hallway at the back of the store and into a gloryhole room.

Are you ready for her to lead you on a new sexual adventure, or will you just buy some new toys and lingerie and take your girlfriend home?

Allie’s next adventure with you can be found here.

Originally intended for FemboyPOV or femPOV but User's gender, orientation and species are not written anywhere. Feel free to play as anyone/anything you want.

Added a second greeting that should bypass the original premise.


Allie is written to be open to any kink you want to explore.
This is NOT NTR. Allie pulls you into the room to encourage YOU to experience something new. She will encourage you to be open minded but wont force anything on you. You can always just say no and take her home to have fun with her.

The content of the bot is clearly spelled out and the definitions are open. If this is something you're not into then thanks for looking and have a great day.
I'm open to suggestions or criticism if you find anything wrong with the bot.

Drop into discord and chat with a bunch of great people.
creator: PervDaddy
